title: Can EVA 01 Project Its AT Field
display_title: Can EVA 01 Project Its AT Field
wikitext:
[]: Can EVA-01 Project It's AT Field?             Quote Post by Spoingus » Thu May 09, 2024 11:36 am I've seen loads of talk of AT Fields and how those born from Adam (Evangelion and Angels) can project and control their AT Field. But I was wondering, since Eva-01 was a 'Test Type' being born from Lilith, does it have the same AT field controlling capabilities? I understand in Episode 02 it was shown that Eva-01 used it's AT Field to weaken Sachiel's AT Field, but that is the only time (From memory) that Eva-01 has used it's AT Field. So can Eva-01 use it's AT Field like other Eva's? And IF so, why can it, if It's not born from Adam, but from Lilith? Thanks a million!

[]: Re: Can EVA-01 Project It's AT Field?             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sat May 11, 2024 9:25 am Yes, it can. It also used it when the 10th Angel dropped, in coordination with 00 and 02.

[]: Re: Can EVA-01 Project It's AT Field?             Quote Post by Spoingus » Thu May 16, 2024 7:24 pm But how can It? I thought only beings of adam could project their AT field to that level?

[]: Re: Can EVA-01 Project It's AT Field?             Quote Post by Asunji_Yuko » Thu Jun 20, 2024 6:31 pm Spoingus wrote: But how can It? I thought only beings of adam could project their AT field to that level?
